title: Create D+
description: A create Addon with some basic tools and materials, made expressly for the Create and Conquer team.
body:
A small Create addon adding basic Materials and tools for Fabric 1.20.1

**Making it clear, you need both Fabric 1.20.1 and Create for the mod to work properly**

Adds 4 new materials, 13 new blocks, 2 ores, 5 new toolsets, a new particle effect, and a new achievement.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



Tin: A naturally spawning ore used to make tin blocks and bronze
Bronze: A alloy of tin and copper with its own toolset, and high enchantability
Brass: A toolset compatible with create mod, high durability and damage but low swing speed
Treated Steel: A alloy of prismarine and Iron, with high durability; can be superheated
Superheated Steel: A firey version of treated steel that is enflamed 

</details>
